title: Creamy American Chicken Casserole
description: A comforting and paleo-friendly casserole featuring chicken, rocket, and dashi extract, perfect for a sick day. This dish is jammy, fluffy, and full of flavor.
instructions: Cook the paleo-friendly pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and cook the chicken until browned.
Add the chopped rocket to the skillet and cook until wilted.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, chicken, and rocket mixture.
In a separate bowl, mix the coconut cream and dashi extract.
Pour the cream mixture over the pasta mixture and stir until combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 25 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
